$comment: The single source the pricing pages render from. Each tier's stripePriceId is filled from the Stripe dashboard per environment — placeholder amounts here are marketing copy, Stripe owns the real prices.

products.name: Casewell
products.tagline: The matter-centric AI legal assistant: docketing, conflicts, drafting, billing — with an audit trail.

tiers.name: Solo
features: Your own private workspace (full tenant isolation)
Matters, docketing with reminders, conflict checks
Clause library, playbook review, PDF drafting
Metered AI included — or bring your own API key

tiers.name: Team
features: Seats for the whole practice — add or remove any time
Roles and permissions per member; approval workflows
Ethical walls and the full audit trail

tiers.name: Dedicated
features: Your own isolated Azure environment, provisioned automatically
Your keys in your Key Vault; optional bring-your-own subscription
